latestUpdates.title: Landing Page Visual Overhaul & Match Flow Polish
items: Added cinematic entrance animations with staggered fade-in-up effects on landing page
New ambient light beam background element for depth and atmosphere
3D tilt card interaction on feature cards for immersive feel
Redesigned Match Profile Modal with improved layout and copy
Header controls polish: improved spacing, icon sizing, and dark/light transitions
Fixed unescaped JSX entities causing production build failures

latestUpdates.title: Trial Match Flow & MatchProfileModal
items: Added 'Match me to Trials' CTA button on landing page
Implemented MatchProfileModal for collecting patient profile before trial matching
Skip-intake flow: users can jump straight to trial matching with ?skip_intake=1&open_match=1
Modal collects age, diagnosis, location and sends user directly to matched trials

latestUpdates.title: UI Polish, Animations & Dev Test Improvements
items: Landing page glassmorphism card hover lift animation
Improved light/dark mode transition smoothness across all components
Session Test Runner page UI/UX overhaul with cleaner layout
Fixed sendUserMessage race condition using advanceTimerRef debounce
Pagination support for clinical trials search results
API robustness improvements: raw clinical trials response handling, undefined payload guards

latestUpdates.title: Clinical Trials Search Pagination & API Robustness
items: Added pagination support for clinical trials search tool
Improved API error handling against undefined or malformed upstream payloads
Updated copyright year to 2026
Added automated chat session test runner with dataset support
Test history page at /dev-test/history for reviewing past test runs

latestUpdates.title: Dynamic Personalization & Complete UI Redesign
items: Personalized starting questions based on user intent (trial matching vs. learning)
Dynamic greetings adapted to user role (patient vs. caregiver)
4 distinct sets of starter prompts for different user profiles
Complete homepage visual redesign with cinematic glass morphism aesthetic
Enhanced glassmorphism effects with backdrop blur and gradient overlays
Redesigned feature cards with hover animations and improved iconography
Optimized responsive layout for all screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Interactive mobile navigation with full-screen overlay menu
Improved typography hierarchy and brand consistency across all breakpoints
Better visual hierarchy with noise textures and decorative grid lines

latestUpdates.title: Voice Input Enhancements & User Feedback
items: Added dual voice input modes: Web Speech API and OpenAI Whisper
Voice input mode selector in header (switch between free real-time and accurate paid options)
OpenAI Whisper integration with auto language detection (Chinese/English)
Voice input comparison test page at /voice-test
Recording timer and processing indicators for Whisper mode
Enabled feedback buttons (thumbs up/down) for AI responses
Enabled retry button for regenerating AI responses
Fixed voice button container blocking input field interaction

latestUpdates.title: Voice Input for Enhanced Accessibility
items: Added voice input button with Web Speech API integration
Real-time speech-to-text with interim results display
Automatic medical terminology correction (Alzheimer's, dementia, MCI, etc.)
36x36px white circular button with blue/red color states
Responsive layout with fixed width breakpoints (575px, 768px)
Visual feedback with pulsing animation and success/error toasts
Positioned to overlay ChatKit's compose area seamlessly

latestUpdates.title: User Personalization & Profile Management
items: Added Personalization menu item in Clerk UserButton dropdown
Created comprehensive profile management page at /personalization
Implemented API routes for viewing, updating, and deleting user profiles
Profile data stored in Supabase including health info, caregiver status, and location preferences
Full support for ADRD diagnosis tracking and mobility preferences

latestUpdates.title: Accessibility & Theme Improvements
items: Added font size selector for elderly-friendly experience
Customized ChatKit theme to match TrialChat medical aesthetic
Updated starter prompts and greetings for ADRD clinical trials
Implemented FontSizeContext for global font size management

latestUpdates.title: Initial Release
items: Created TrialChat homepage with medical-themed design
Integrated OpenAI ChatKit for conversational AI
Implemented Clerk authentication
Set up session management with cookies

plannedFeatures.title: Multi-language Voice Input Support
plannedFeatures.description: Add support for Spanish, Chinese, and other languages for voice input

plannedFeatures.title: Voice Output (Text-to-Speech)
plannedFeatures.description: Read AI responses aloud for users with visual impairments
